per_question.question: Какой scope drop у команды cthulhu?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, sprint_name, scope_drop FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%%cthulhu%%' ORDER BY sprint_name

per_question.question: Done total команды lpop
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, sprint_name, done_total FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%%lpop%%'

per_question.question: У какой команды самый высокий done_total?

per_question.question: У какой команды самый большой scope drop?

per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(scope_drop) FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics GROUP BY feature_teams ORDER BY 2 DESC

per_question.question: Какие команды имеют средний done total ниже 80%?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(done_total) FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics GROUP BY feature_teams HAVING AVG(done_total) < 80

per_question.question: Команды со средним scope drop больше 25%
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(scope_drop) FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics GROUP BY feature_teams HAVING AVG(scope_drop) > 25

per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, COUNT(*) AS bug_count FROM report_agile_dashboard WHERE issue_type = 'Bug' GROUP BY feature_teams ORDER BY bug_count DESC LIMIT 3
